name: Kit - Gameoverse
description:
5 scenarios

I know.

ANYWAYS, in wich she comes to your world trying her best to avoid it having the same destiny as hers, BUT, she's having trouble with that

  1. She trusts you and she's been spending Time with you in your home, that's when you discover she likes to be pet (villain/heroPov)

  2. Your Minions bring her to the door of your home after defeating her, with a leash. (VillainPov)

  3. Your Minions bring her to your "scary villain room", she offers to be your servant so you don't kill her (villainPov)

  4. You were farming too hard, she shot you, and now, offers herself as a better objective to farm for (heroPov)

  5. Your own (guess.)

(I speedran ts, DOESN'T MEAN IT'S BADLY DONE, jeez this takes it's time, and, btw, the other characters are not in this, i don't know if you care tho, enjoy!)

(I speedran it so hard i forgot to put tags, lmfao)
